backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing an e-commerce backend with product management, shopping cart functionality, user profiles, Stripe payment integration via HTTP outcalls, and role-based access control (admin/user permissions).
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no features documented.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON-formatted summaries of all frontend files describing a React e-commerce application with TanStack Router, Stripe payment integration, admin panel, cart management, and yellow-themed UI with Apple-inspired typography.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a complete design system using OKLCH color space for light and dark modes with grayscale and chart color palettes.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the GLORY 123 application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component defining TanStack Router configuration with routes for products, cart, payment, admin, and payment success/failure pages, wrapped in a layout with Header, Footer, and Toaster.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying GLORY 123 branding, contact information (phone 9892246308, Mumbai address), social media links, and Caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Sticky header navigation with GLORY 123 logo, links to Products and Admin pages, and shopping cart icon with dynamic item count badge.
frontend/src/components/PaymentSetup.tsx: Admin component for configuring Stripe payment integration with form inputs for secret key and allowed countries, displaying only when Stripe is not yet configured.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that creates and manages an authenticated actor instance for backend communication, using Internet Identity and initializing access control with an admin token from URL parameters.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminAuth.ts: Custom React hook that manages admin authentication state using sessionStorage, providing login/logout functions and authentication status.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides React context and hooks for Internet Identity authentication, managing identity state, login/logout flows, and delegation validity using @dfinity/auth-client.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for all backend operations including products, cart management, Stripe configuration, and checkout session creation using the actor from useActor.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a yellow/gold color theme for both light and dark modes using HSL color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin panel page with password-protected login (hardcoded 'admin123') and a form for adding products with name, category, price, description, and image upload functionality.
frontend/src/pages/CartPage.tsx: Shopping cart page displaying cart items with quantity controls, item removal, and total calculation, with navigation to checkout or back to shopping.
frontend/src/pages/OrderSuccessPage.tsx: Order confirmation page displaying a success message with options to continue shopping or view cart.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentFailurePage.ts: Displays a payment failure page with error messaging, troubleshooting tips, and navigation buttons to retry payment or return to cart.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentPage.tsx: Payment page that integrates Stripe checkout, converts cart items to shopping items, creates a checkout session, and redirects users to Stripe's hosted payment page.
frontend/src/pages/PaymentSuccessPage.ts: Displays a payment success confirmation page, invalidates cart queries to clear the cart, and provides navigation to continue shopping or view cart.
frontend/src/pages/ProductDetailPage.tsx: Shows detailed product information including image, description, price, and category with an add-to-cart button; handles loading and not-found states.
frontend/src/pages/ProductListPage.tsx: Main product listing page with hero banner, search functionality, category filtering, and a responsive grid displaying all products with navigation to detail pages.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, storing, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, typography, container queries, animations, and custom font stack. Includes plugins for typography, container queries, and animations with accordion keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state metadata indicating a fix request for production deployment failures (Version 7), with one pending feature request to retry the deployment. Schema version 1.0.0, project state version 3.
